description: Text generation based on tag suggestions, using Claude, OpenAI, Ollama, Kimi, Doubao, Qwen, Zhipu, DeepSeek, QianFan & more.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🔧 3.5.2 Improvements

- **Settings page refactored**: Refactored settings page using the new `SettingGroup` API introduced in Obsidian 1.11+
  - Minimum Obsidian version requirement raised to 1.11.0
- **New Claude models**: Added claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-opus-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-5, claude-opus-4-5, claude-haiku-4-5

## 🔧 3.5.2 改进

- **设置页面重构**: 使用 Obsidian 1.11+ 新增的 `SettingGroup` API 重构设置页面
  - 最低 Obsidian 版本要求提升至 1.11.0
- **Claude 新模型**: 新增 claude-sonnet-4-6、claude-opus-4-6、claude-sonnet-4-5、claude-opus-4-5、claude-haiku-4-5

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 3.5.1 Fixes
* fix:  #117 Message Tags with "/"

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🆕 3.5 New Features

- **X.ai Grok Integration**:
  - 🆕 Added support for [X.ai Grok](https://x.ai) provider, covering text generation and image understanding capabilities
  - 💡 Feature highlights: Supports text generation, reasoning, and image vision capabilities

## 🆕 3.5 新功能

- **X.ai Grok 集成**:
  - 🆕 新增对 [X.ai Grok](https://x.ai) 提供商的支持
  - 💡 功能亮点: 支持文本生成、推理和图像视觉能力

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🔧 3.4.2 Fixes

- **Kimi Model Fix**: Resolved issue with unavailable models appearing in Kimi model list by switching to official ListModels API

## 🔧 3.4.2 修复

- **Kimi 模型修复**: 修复 Kimi 模型列表显示不可用模型的问题，改用官方 ListModels API 接口

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🆕 3.4 New Features

- **Interactive Status Bar**:
  - 🖱️ **Click for Details**: Clickable status bar displays generation statistics or error details
  - 📊 **Detailed Stats Panel**: Shows comprehensive information including rounds, model, vendor, character count, and duration
  - 🔍 **Hover Preview**: Quick status overview on mouse hover
  - ❌ **Error Handling**: Auto-clearing error states with stack trace and copy functionality
- **Kimi Model Fix**: Resolved compatibility and stability issues with Kimi provider

## 🆕 3.4 新功能

- **交互式状态栏**:
  - 🖱️ **点击查看详情**: 状态栏支持点击交互，显示生成统计信息或错误详情
  - 📊 **详细统计面板**: 显示轮次、模型、供应商、字符数、用时等完整信息
  - 🔍 **悬停预览**: 鼠标悬停即可快速查看基本状态信息
  - ❌ **错误处理**: 错误状态自动超时清理，提供堆栈跟踪和复制功能
- **Kimi 模型修复**: 修复 Kimi 模型的兼容性问题

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🆕 3.3 New Features

- **Kimi Advanced Features**:
  - 🧠 **Reasoning Mode**: Support for reasoning model outputs
  - 🔍 **Image Vision**: Multimodal image analysis and understanding capabilities
- **New Kimi Models**:
  - `kimi-thinking-preview`: Reasoning-capable thinking model
  - `kimi-k2-0711-preview`: Latest generation conversational model
  - `moonshot-v1-32k-vision-preview`: Multimodal model with image understanding

## 🆕 3.3 新增功能

- **Kimi 高级特性**:
  - 🧠 **推理模式**: 支持推理模型的思考过程输出
  - 🔍 **图像理解**: 支持多模态图像分析和理解能力
- **Kimi 新模型**:
  - `kimi-thinking-preview`: 具备推理能力的思考模型
  - `kimi-k2-0711-preview`: 最新一代对话模型
  - `moonshot-v1-32k-vision-preview`: 支持图像理解的多模态模型

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 3.2 New Capabilities

- **Claude Advanced Features**:
  - 🧠 **Thinking Mode**: Enable Claude's internal reasoning process with configurable token budget
  - 🔍 **Web Search**: Real-time internet search capability for up-to-date information
- **Technical Improvements**:
  - Updated @anthropic-ai/sdk to version ^0.56.0 for latest API features


## 🆕 3.2 新增功能

- **Claude 高级特性**:
  - 🧠 **思考模式**: 启用 Claude 内部推理过程，支持可配置的令牌预算
  - 🔍 **网页搜索**: 实时互联网搜索功能，获取最新信息
- **技术改进**:
  - 升级 @anthropic-ai/sdk 至 ^0.56.0 版本，支持最新 API 功能

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🌟 3.1 Enhanced Vision Capabilities

Extended image and document understanding across multiple providers:

- **OpenAI**: Added Image Vision support
- **OpenRouter**: Added Image Vision and PDF Vision support
- **Qwen**: Added Image Vision support
- **SiliconFlow**: Added Image Vision support

## 🌟 3.1 多模态能力增强

视觉支持扩展:

- **OpenAI**: 图像理解
- **OpenRouter**: 图像理解 + PDF 文档理解
- **Qwen**: 图像理解
- **SiliconFlow**: 图像理解

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🆕 New Features

- **Image Generation Support**: Added gpt-image-1 model for image generation and editing
- **Model Expansion**: Support for Claude Vision, Claude Sonnet-4, Claude Opus-4

### 🆕 新功能

- **图像生成支持**: 增加 gpt-image-1 模型进行图像生成和编辑
- **模型扩展**: 支持 Claude Vision, Claude Sonnet-4, Claude Opus-4

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Improvements

- Smart formatting optimization: Automatically adds appropriate leading line breaks for special content like tables and code blocks, ensuring correct rendering
- Markdown format fixes: Automatically corrects formatting issues such as table empty lines and redundant elements caused by Obsidian's auto-completion

## 改进

- 智能格式优化：自动为标题、表格和代码块等特殊内容添加适当的前导换行，确保正确渲染
- Markdown格式修复：自动纠正Obsidian自动补全可能导致的表格空行和多余元素等格式问题

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Improvements

- During text generation, even if users manually move the cursor or click elsewhere, the plugin automatically readjusts it to the correct insertion position.

## 改进

- 文本生成过程中，即使用户手动移动光标，点击其他位置，插件也会自动将其调整回正确的生成位置。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Improvements

- Added "Cancel generation" command to cancel generation for streaming completions.

## 改进

- 增加 “取消生成” 命令，对于流式生成，可以取消生成。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文版本

- 🔨修复在生成内容过程中，遇到格式复杂，特殊符号的情况下，光标定位不准确，导致输出混乱的问题
- Claude 增加 claude-3-7-sonnet-latest模型

## English Version

- 🔨 Fixed cursor positioning issues with complex formatting and special characters that caused output rendering problems
- Added claude-3-7-sonnet-latest model to Claude

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文版本

🔥标签建议，重新设计的触发逻辑更符合软件设计，性能优化显著。  
输入`#`，借用obsidian自身的标签补全后，再输入空格触发。  
移动端如果不方便输入`#`，输入完整的标签（不带#），来触发。

## English Version

🔥 Tag suggestions with redesigned trigger logic that better aligns with software design principles and significantly improved performance.  
Type `#` and use Obsidian's native tag completion, then press space to trigger.  
On mobile devices where typing `#` might be inconvenient, you can type the complete tag (without #) to trigger.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文版本

- 🔥加入标签命令，所有标签都在命令列表里。标签命令基于选中/光标处的段落，插入相应的标签。  
  快速回答：把光标移到该行（或者选择多个段落），从命令列表中选择助手标签（比如#DeepSeek:），进行回答。
- 🔥自定义提示词模板, 首次使用请执行”加载模板文件”命令
- 🔥状态栏，实时显示生成的字符数量, 轮次，耗时。

## English Version

- 🔥 Added tag commands, all tags are available in the command list. Tag commands insert the appropriate tags based on selected sections or the section at cursor position.
  Quick response: Move the cursor to the line (or select multiple sections), choose an assistant tag (like #DeepSeek:) from the command list to generate a response.
- 🔥 Custom prompt templates, run the "Load template file" command when using for the first time
- 🔥 Status bar that displays real-time information about character count, rounds, and time spent.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文版本

- 修复 1.x 版本的 Kimi 服务报错，status code 404。Kimi 服务的 `baseURL` 更新。如果之前已经配置好，请删除重新新增，或者将 `baseURL` 改为页面显示的默认值

## English Version

- Fixed Kimi service error in version 1.x (status code 404). The Kimi service `baseURL` has been updated. If previously configured, please delete and re-add, or change the `baseURL` to the default value shown on the page

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文版本

- 🔥 新增[SiliconFlow 硅基流动](https://siliconflow.cn)，支持 DeepSeek V3/R1 等等数十种大模型

## English Version

- 🔥 Added [SiliconFlow](https://siliconflow.cn), supporting dozens of large language models including DeepSeek V3/R1 and more

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文版本

- 🔥 适配移动端
- 编译环境从 Node 转到浏览器
- Doubao 改为非流式请求，QianFan 移动端改为非流式请求
- 废弃 `proxyUrl`
- Qwen 服务的 `baseURL` 更新。如果之前已经配置好，可以删除重新新增，或者将 `baseURL` 改为页面显示的默认值

## English Version

- 🔥 Adapted for mobile devices
- Compilation environment switched from Node to browser
- Doubao changed to non-streaming requests, QianFan mobile changed to non-streaming requests
- Deprecated `proxyUrl`
- Updated Qwen service `baseURL`. If previously configured, you can delete and re-add, or change the `baseURL` to the default value displayed on the page

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文版本
- Azure: 支持 o1，deepseek-r1，gpt-4o 等等， 思维链以callout方式输出

## English Version
- Azure: Support o1, deepseek-r1, gpt-4o, etc., with chain-of-thought output in callout format

## Thanks

@kawnnor #49

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文版本
1. DeepSeek：增加推理模型 deepseek-reasoner， 思维链以callout方式输出  
2. Zhipu：增加网络搜索选项，更新模型选项  
3. Claude：更新模型选项  
4. 界面优化：设置页面，在新增助手时，自动展开  
5. 调试：丰富了控制台的日志输出  
6. 工程化: 增加 eslint 和 prettier  
7. Fix： text accumulation in fetchTextForTag function

## English Version

1. DeepSeek: Added reasoning model deepseek-reasoner, outputting CoT in callout format
2. Zhipu: Added web search option, updated model options
3. Claude: Updated model options
4. UI Optimization: Automatically expand when adding a new assistant in the settings page
5. Debugging: Enhanced console log output
6. Engineering: Added eslint and prettier
7. Fix: text accumulation in fetchTextForTag function

##  Thanks

@SleepingLucas 增加推理模型 deepseek-reasoner #39 
@moziar Zhipu增加网络搜索选项 #40
